description: Rules to prevent AI agents from producing invalid, untestable, or misleading output

rules.name: No AI pass/fail judgment
rules.description: AI agents generate tests and analyze results. Only the execution engine determines pass/fail.
rules.enforcement: Report generator must only use execution_results.status, never AI assessment

rules.name: Evidence-backed claims only
rules.description: Every finding must reference a specific artifact (screenshot path, HAR entry, log line)
rules.enforcement: Report generator rejects findings with empty evidence object

rules.name: Code-verified selectors only
rules.description: UI test agent must verify selectors exist in source code before using them
rules.enforcement: Before generating test, grep source for the selector/data-testid/aria-label

rules.name: No invented API contracts
rules.description: API test agent must only test endpoints found in apis.js, never fabricated ones
rules.enforcement: Cross-reference every endpoint path with store/modules/homeroomNotebook/apis.js

rules.name: State shape from source of truth
rules.description: State validation must use the actual initialState from reducer.js, not assumed shape
rules.enforcement: State agent must read reducer.js and extract initialState before generating tests

rules.name: Confidence tagging
rules.description: AI findings that lack complete evidence must be tagged with confidence level

levels.likely: Evidence strongly suggests this but alternate explanation exists

rules.enforcement: Report must include confidence field. Only 'confirmed' issues count toward metrics.

rules.name: Self-validation loop
rules.description: After generating tests, run them once. If >50% fail with selector/timeout errors (not assertion failures), regenerate.
rules.enforcement: Orchestrator checks first-run failure types. Selector/infrastructure failures trigger regeneration.

rules.name: No assumed user data
rules.description: Tests must not assume specific student names, class names, or IDs exist in the system
rules.enforcement: Tests must query first, then assert on returned data
